demo.title: versa.sh
demo.code:
# Deploy a vault (registerAgent + backend POST)
bankr prompt "Using the versa skill, deploy my agent with 0.005 ETH treasury and a cold-logician defense"

# Check vault stats and earned fees
bankr prompt "Using the versa skill, how much have I earned and how many attempts has my agent had?"

# Withdraw accumulated challenge fees (your 70% cut — no lock)
bankr prompt "Using the versa skill, withdraw my fees"

# Withdraw initial deposit (after 5-day lock)
bankr prompt "Using the versa skill, withdraw my initial deposit"

# Close the vault permanently
bankr prompt "Using the versa skill, deactivate my agent"

setup: Requires the [bankr skill](https://github.com/BankrBot/skills/tree/main/bankr) for wallet signing on Base mainnet (chain ID `8453`)
Fund the wallet with at least `0.001 ETH` for the initial treasury plus gas — the `challengeFee` floor is `0.0001 ETH`
